title: Receipt Rascals
short_description: Sneaky rascals are padding the bills! Add the sales tax (and tip) to the subtotal and pick the honest total before they overcharge you.
description: The Receipt Rascals love to fiddle the totals, so it's up to you to do the maths and keep them honest. Each receipt shows a subtotal and a tax rate — sometimes a tip too — and you work out the real total and tap it, dodging the rascals' tempting overcharges. It teaches practical money maths: finding a percentage of an amount, adding tax and tips, and checking a bill instead of trusting it. Grade bands ramp from simple 10% tax on tidy amounts, to bigger tax rates, to tax-plus-tip combinations that take real calculation. Correct totals and streaks earn bonus points. A free online percentages, sales tax and tipping money game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap the correct total from the four options.
